moments.title: The Open Championship 2026 Underway
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is being played from July 16-19 at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, with the world's best golfers competing for the Claret Jug.

angles.name: General Interest
angles.copy: The Open Championship is in full swing at Royal Birkdale! Who are you backing to lift the Claret Jug this Sunday? #TheOpen

angles.name: Weekend Golf
angles.copy: Weekend at the Open! Royal Birkdale is hosting the final rounds of the 154th Open Championship. Tune in for all the drama.

moments.title: England Out of World Cup
moments.blurb: England suffered a heartbreaking 2-1 defeat to defending champions Argentina in the World Cup semi-final on July 15, leading to widespread discussion about the team's performance and manager Thomas Tuchel's tactics.

angles.name: Recap & Reaction
angles.copy: Still reeling from England's World Cup exit? The debate around the semi-final loss to Argentina is just getting started. What's your take?

angles.name: Managerial Discussion
angles.copy: Thomas Tuchel's tactics under the microscope after England's World Cup semi-final defeat. Was it the 'football DNA' or a tactical misstep?

moments.title: The Hundred Cricket Season Begins
moments.blurb: The Hundred 2026 season kicks off on July 21st, with the men's and women's 100-ball cricket tournaments running until August 16th across England and Wales.

angles.name: Launch Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for 100-ball action! The Hundred returns next week with new teams and an exciting schedule. Who are you supporting?

angles.name: Welsh Fire Focus
angles.copy: The Welsh Fire are ready to ignite The Hundred season, with their first home game in Cardiff on July 23rd! Get behind our local team!

moments.title: Latitude & Truck Festivals Next Week
moments.blurb: Two major UK festivals, Latitude in Suffolk and Truck Festival in Oxfordshire, are set to take place from July 23-26, featuring a blend of indie, alternative, and multi-genre acts.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Festival season continues! Latitude and Truck Festival kick off next week. Who's got their wellies packed and their tents ready?

angles.name: Suffolk Local Angle
angles.copy: Henham Park is getting ready for Latitude Festival next week! If you're heading to Suffolk for the music and arts, tell us who you're most excited to see!

moments.title: Weekend Festivals Across UK
moments.blurb: This weekend sees Splendour Festival in Nottingham (July 18-19), Big Love Festival in Monmouthshire, Wales (July 16-19), and Doune the Rabbit Hole in Stirlingshire, Scotland (July 17-19) bringing live music and arts to various regions.

angles.name: Multi-region Festival
angles.copy: From Nottingham to the Scottish Highlands, and down to Wales, there are festivals popping up all over the UK this weekend! Where are you getting your live music fix?

angles.name: Welsh Festival
angles.copy: Big Love Festival is bringing music and good vibes to Monmouthshire this weekend! If you're heading to the Welsh countryside, let us know who you're seeing!

angles.name: Scottish Festival
angles.copy: Doune the Rabbit Hole is on in Stirlingshire this weekend! Enjoying the Scottish festival atmosphere?

moments.title: Reading & Leeds Festival Line-up & Revamp
moments.blurb: Reading & Leeds Festival (August 27-30) recently announced its line-up including Charli XCX, Fontaines DC, Dave, RAYE, Florence + The Machine, Chase & Status, and Kasabian, alongside a 'biggest ever' stage and arena overhaul.

angles.name: Lineup Hype
angles.copy: Reading & Leeds has dropped its massive line-up and announced a huge stage revamp! Who are you most buzzing to see later this summer?

angles.name: Festival Changes
angles.copy: New stages and big names like Charli XCX, Dave, and Florence + The Machine are heading to Reading & Leeds this August. It's set to be Britain's largest festival this summer!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The latest Official UK Singles Chart (July 9-15) sees 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean at Number 1, with Olivia Rodrigo's 'Stupid Song' at Number 2 and Ariana Grande's 'Hate That I Made You Love Me' at Number 3.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Your Official UK Singles Chart update! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold strong at Number 1. Who else is in the Top 3 this week?

angles.name: Olivia Rodrigo
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo's 'Stupid Song' is climbing the charts, sitting at Number 2 this week! What's your favourite track from her new album?

moments.title: New TV Shows This July
moments.blurb: July brings a fresh wave of TV, including Diane Morgan's new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid' (started July 11), ITV thriller 'The Dark' starring Laura Donnelly, and 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar: Season 2' (premiered July 12 on Netflix).

angles.name: Comedy & Drama
angles.copy: What's on your watch list this July? Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' is on BBC, and ITV has a moody new thriller, 'The Dark'.

angles.name: Reality TV
angles.copy: Love is Blind: UK is back with 'After the Altar' Season 2 on Netflix! Catch up with the couples and see what's unfolded since the pods.

moments.title: Happy 63rd Birthday Regina Belle
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning R&B singer Regina Belle, known for hits like 'A Whole New World' and 'Baby Come to Me', turns 63 today.

angles.name: R&B Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 63rd Birthday to the incredible Regina Belle! What's your favourite track from the R&B legend?

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday Geezer Butler
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, legendary bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Geezer Butler! The Black Sabbath bassist and lyricist is a true rock legend.

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! On July 26th, the legendary Mick Jagger turns 83! What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

moments.title: Glastonbury Pride 2026
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Pride, a grass-roots LGBTQIA+ event, is set to take place in Glastonbury, Somerset on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Local Pride Event
angles.copy: Glastonbury Pride is happening on July 26th! Join the celebrations in Somerset for a day of community and diversity.

moments.title: Buckingham Palace Summer Opening
moments.blurb: Buckingham Palace's State Rooms are open for summer tours from July 9th to September 27th, offering a chance to explore the lavish interiors and Royal Collection.

angles.name: Royal Sightseeing
angles.copy: Fancy a peek inside Buckingham Palace? The State Rooms are open for summer tours until late September! A must-see for visitors to London.

angles.name: London Activity
angles.copy: Explore the lavish interiors and Royal Collection at Buckingham Palace this summer. It's a great day out in the capital!
